mapper.select:
select p.id, p.cover_url as coverUrl, p.title, p.content, u.username, p.like_count as likeCount, p.comment_count as commentCount, p.status, p.create_time as createTime from post p left join user u on p.user_id = u.id
p.is_deleted = 0
and p.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
and u.username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and p.status = #{status}
order by p.create_time desc

select p.id, p.cover_url as coverUrl, p.title, p.content, u.username, p.like_count as likeCount, p.comment_count as commentCount, p.status, p.reject_reason as rejectReason, p.create_time as createTime from post p left join user u on p.user_id = u.id where p.id = #{id} and p.is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select id, user_id as userId, cover_url as coverUrl, title, content, like_count as likeCount, comment_count as commentCount, status, reject_reason as rejectReason, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from post where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update post set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
